category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a statistics collection and monitoring daemon; official collectd documentation calls it a system statistics collection daemon.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is collectd; official documentation and homepage title use collectd.
docs_sources: Official collectd documentation page provides manpages, getting started, FAQ, and special documentation.
repo_sources: Official collectd download/development pages state the Git repository and issue tracker are hosted on GitHub at collectd/collectd, with a GitHub mirror linked from development info.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official documentation describe system statistics collection, daemon usage, plugins, manpages, and CLI executables.
